unhostedWallets.notes: Travel rule transmission obligation does not apply to transfers to/from unhosted wallets (no counterparty VASP). However, DPT service providers must collect and retain counterparty information and verify wallet ownership as part of CDD/risk management. Revised April 2024 under PSN02 amendment.

rules.notes: MAS Notice PSN02 applies to all DPT transfers regardless of amount. Basic info (name, account number) required for all transfers. For transfers >= SGD 1,500: enhanced originator info required — one of address, national ID, or date/place of birth (alternatives, not all mandatory). Originally effective January 28, 2020; revised April 2024.
